description: CompositionBlack polyester cap with dry Fit comfort and adjustable strap at the backWash careHand wash or machine washSummer’s here in full glory and it’s time to look cool in caps. This adidas Adipur cap has a retro look and adds that stylish zing when indulging in a game of soccer. The adjustable strap at the back and firm shade in the front ensure a snug, comfortable and shaded fit.
